name: Optimus Group Company Limited
summary: Optimus Group Company Limited engages in the vehicle trading business. Its Trading segment buys used vehicles through auction houses and exports them to local car dealers worldwide. The company's Logistics segment is involved in the transportation of used cars from Japan to overseas. Its Service segment provides auto financing loans; and on-site pre-vehicle inspection maintenance services. The company's Inspection segment provides pre-shipment inspection of used cars, imported vehicles, and domestic vehicle inspections. Optimus Group Company Limited was founded in 2015 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
